sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f: position size adjusts with account equity movement along efficient frontier. At geometric optimal point (peak), fraction of f = 1.0 (full Kelly); at lower bound, fraction of f = 0 (no position). Scale adjusts continuously as equity increases (up-right) or decreases (down-left) on portfolio curve.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f technique where position sizing adjusts as account equity increases (moving up and to the right on the efficient frontier) or decreases (moving down and to the left), with limits bounded by fraction of f equals 1 at the peak and fraction of f equals 0 at the lower bound.
